title: Method and apparatus for source code generation
abstract: A method and an apparatus for source code generation are provided. The method includes: determining a target feature according to a first fragment (210), where the first fragment includes one or more codes typed in by a user before a first moment, and the target feature is used to indicate code properties of codes in a fragment; generating multiple candidate fragments (220); and choosing a second fragment from the multiple candidate fragments according to the target feature (230), where a feature of the second fragment has the highest similarity to the target feature among features of the multiple candidate fragments. A target feature is obtained based on source codes typed in by a user as a sequential preference of the user. Source code suggestion providing to the user is generated based on the sequential preference of the user. In other words, the generated source code is relevant to source codes typed in by the user. Thus, the accuracy of generating source code can be improved.
claims:
